Biennial (every 2 years) - expires August 31 every even-numbered year

Biennial (every 2 years) - renewal by May 31 of renewal year

privileged_info_summary: The task requires research on physical therapist licensing using the CareerOneStop License Finder tool (https://www.careeronestop.org/Toolkit/Training/find-licenses.aspx), a real public tool for occupational licensing information. Arizona physical therapists renew biennially (every 2 years) through the Arizona State Board of Physical Therapy. Maryland physical therapists also renew biennially through the Maryland Board of Physical Therapy Examiners. Washington physical therapists renew annually on their birthday through the Board of Physical Therapy under the Washington State Department of Health. All licensing authorities and renewal frequencies are publicly available and verified from official state board websites.
